tourData.title: Tour del Bernabéu
tourData.description: Experience the legendary home of Real Madrid
tourData.heroSubtitle: Discover the history and glory of the world's most iconic football stadium

highlights.title: Stadium History
highlights.description: Built in 1947, home to 14 European Cups

highlights.title: Legendary Players
highlights.description: From Alfredo Di Stéfano to Cristiano Ronaldo

infoSections.heading: Why Visit?
infoSections.content: The Bernabéu is more than a stadium—it's a temple of football where history lives in every corner. Feel the passion that has driven Real Madrid to glory for over 75 years.

infoSections.heading: Tour Highlights
infoSections.content: Walk the players' tunnel, sit in the Real Madrid dressing room, explore the museum of trophies, and stand on the most legendary pitch in world football.

tourData.seoDescription: Experience the iconic Bernabéu Stadium. Book your official tour of Real Madrid's legendary home. History, passion, and glory await.
tourData.seoKeywords: Bernabéu tour, Real Madrid stadium, Madrid tourism
